sentences.arabic: اسْتَيْقَظَ حَسَنٌ وَوَجَدَ كُلَّ أَلْعَابِهِ مُرَتَّبَةً.
sentences.translation: Hasan se probudio i pronašao sve svoje igračke poredane.
sentences.translationEn: Hassan woke up and found all his toys tidied up.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْأَلْعَابُ فِي فَوْضَى كَبِيرَةٍ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَنَامَ.
sentences.translation: Igračke su bile u velikom neredu prije nego što je zaspao.
sentences.translationEn: The toys had been in a big mess before he went to sleep.

sentences.translation: Mnogo se začudio i pozvao majku.
sentences.translationEn: He was very surprised and called his mother.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْأُمُّ: رَتَّبَتْهَا أُخْتُكَ بَعْدَ أَنْ نِمْتَ.
sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: Tvoja sestra ih je pospremila nakon što si zaspao.
sentences.translationEn: The mother said: Your sister tidied them after you fell asleep.

sentences.translation: Hasan je otišao, poljubio sestru i zahvalio joj.
sentences.translationEn: Hassan went and kissed his sister and thanked her.
